user.title: YouVersion Bible API
user.description: Enter your YouVersion Developer Token, the numeric Bible version ID and the language for the verse text.

data.version: Bible Version ID (numeric, e.g. 1 = KJV, 111 = NIV, 129 = NVI-PT)

error.invalid_version: The specified Bible version ID was not found.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the YouVersion API.

init.title: YouVersion Bible API
init.description: Change the Bible version ID or language used for the Verse of the Day.

error.invalid_token: Stored developer token is no longer valid.
error.invalid_version: The specified Bible version ID was not found.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the YouVersion API.
